description: Receives and processes SDES (Secure Data Exchange Service) file notification callbacks. Accepts four notification types: FileReady, FileReceived, FileProcessed, and FileProcessingFailure. All notification types are acknowledged with 200 OK after logging. No database writes occur — this endpoint is purely for log-and-acknowledge of SDES lifecycle events.

responses.description: OK — notification received and acknowledged (all notification types).
Bad Request — JSON body failed to parse as SdesNotification, or unknown notification type discriminator.

authentication.notes: This endpoint does NOT use the authorised action builder. It uses Action.apply directly. No Government Gateway authentication is required. SDES calls this endpoint as a callback.

interactions.action: POST /receive-sdes-notifications with SdesNotification JSON body (notification discriminator: FileReady | FileReceived | FileProcessed | FileProcessingFailure)
Parse JSON body as SdesNotification using discriminator field 'notification' with type names matching case class simple names
FileReady: log info 'File ready notification received for {filename} from SDES [{correlationID}]'
FileReceived: log info 'File received notification received for {filename} from SDES [{correlationID}]'
FileProcessed: log info 'File processed notification received for {filename} from SDES'
FileProcessingFailure: log warning 'File processing failure notification received for {filename} from SDES. Reason: {failureReason}. Action Required: {actionRequired}'
Return 200 OK for all notification types

specialCases: No authentication is enforced — this is an inbound callback from SDES and does not use Government Gateway auth.
All four notification types return 200 OK, including FileProcessingFailure. The failure is only logged as a warning, not acted upon programmatically.
The JSON discriminator is the field 'notification' with values matching the case class simple names (FileReady, FileReceived, FileProcessed, FileProcessingFailure).
FileProcessingFailure includes 'failureReason' and 'actionRequired' fields that are logged but no automated remediation is triggered.
FileReady and FileReceived include 'availableUntil'/'dateTime' fields; FileProcessingFailure adds 'failureReason' and 'actionRequired'.
